---
title: "taj_pi"
author: "Andrea Estandia"
date: "01/04/2026"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup}
# Knitr settings: 
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = rprojroot::find_rstudio_root_file())
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, eval = FALSE)
options(scipen = 999)
```

```{r}
source("./src/wm-europe_source.R")
```

```{r}
make_taj_plot <- function(pop, reports_path) {
  file_path <- file.path(
    reports_path,
    "tajimasD",
    paste0(pop, "_tajimasD_50kb.Tajima.D")
  )

  taj <- data.table::fread(file_path, header = TRUE)
  taj$n <- seq_len(nrow(taj))

  taj <- taj %>%
    filter(!grepl("scaffold|mito", CHROM))

  chrom_levels <- unique(taj$CHROM)

  axisdf <- taj %>%
    group_by(CHROM) %>%
    summarize(center = (max(n) + min(n)) / 2, .groups = "drop")

  taj <- taj %>%
    mutate(CHROM = factor(CHROM, levels = chrom_levels))

  ggplot(taj %>% filter(N_SNPS > 500), aes(x = n, y = TajimaD, col = CHROM)) +
    geom_line() +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      panel.grid = element_blank(),
      axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
      axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black"),
      text = element_text(family = "roboto_condensed", size = 16),
      legend.position = "none",
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
    ) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -5 * sd(taj$TajimaD, na.rm = TRUE), linetype = "dashed") +
    geom_hline(yintercept =  5 * sd(taj$TajimaD, na.rm = TRUE), linetype = "dashed") +
    scale_x_continuous(
      breaks = axisdf$center,
      labels = gsub("chr|scaffold", "", axisdf$CHROM),
      expand = c(0.01, 0.01)
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(values = rep(c("#506485", "#8a94a6"), 26)) +
    labs(
      title = pop,
      y = "Tajima's D\n",
      x = "\n"
    )
}

make_pi_plot <- function(pop, reports_path) {
  file_path <- file.path(
    reports_path,
    "pi",
    paste0(pop, "_pi_50kb.windowed.pi")
  )

  pi_dat <- data.table::fread(file_path, header = TRUE)

  # If your pi file uses BIN_START / BIN_END, this gives a midpoint axis
  pi_dat$n <- seq_len(nrow(pi_dat))
  pi_dat$mid <- (pi_dat$BIN_START + pi_dat$BIN_END) / 2

  pi_dat <- pi_dat %>%
    filter(!grepl("scaffold|mito", CHROM))

  chrom_levels <- unique(pi_dat$CHROM)

  axisdf <- pi_dat %>%
    group_by(CHROM) %>%
    summarize(center = (max(n) + min(n)) / 2, .groups = "drop")

  pi_dat <- pi_dat %>%
    mutate(CHROM = factor(CHROM, levels = chrom_levels))

  ggplot(pi_dat %>% filter(N_VARIANTS > 500), aes(x = n, y = PI, col = CHROM)) +
    geom_line() +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      panel.grid = element_blank(),
      axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
      axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black"),
      text = element_text(family = "roboto_condensed", size = 16),
      legend.position = "none",
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
    ) +
    scale_x_continuous(
      breaks = axisdf$center,
      labels = gsub("chr|scaffold", "", axisdf$CHROM),
      expand = c(0.01, 0.01)
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(values = rep(c("#506485", "#8a94a6"), 26)) +
    labs(
      title = pop,
      y = "Pi\n",
      x = "\n"
    )
}

pops <- c("norway", "shetland", "spain", "uk")

taj_plots <- lapply(pops, make_taj_plot, reports_path = reports_path)
pi_plots  <- lapply(pops, make_pi_plot,  reports_path = reports_path)

taj_col <- wrap_plots(taj_plots, ncol = 1)
pi_col  <- wrap_plots(pi_plots,  ncol = 1)

combined_plot <- taj_col | pi_col

combined_plot

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(figures_path, "tajimasD_pi_50kb.png"),
  plot = combined_plot,
  width = 12,
  height = 12,
  dpi = 300
)
```
